page.t: A dedicated, empty arena cluster for XMultiplayer PvP sessions.
An empty sector reserved for XMultiplayer arena duels.
Start a dedicated PvP arena session. No factions, no economy, no jobs -- just you, your opponent, and empty space.
You have joined an XMultiplayer arena session. Wait for your opponent to connect, then fight.
A dedicated arena cluster for XMultiplayer PvP sessions, set in a dense asteroid field.
A dedicated arena cluster for XMultiplayer PvP sessions, set in a drifting debris field.
A dedicated arena cluster for XMultiplayer PvP sessions, set in a dense nebula.
An asteroid-field sector reserved for XMultiplayer arena duels.
A debris-field sector reserved for XMultiplayer arena duels.
A nebula sector reserved for XMultiplayer arena duels.
Start a dedicated PvP arena session amid a dense asteroid field. No factions, no economy, no jobs -- just you, your opponent, and the rocks.
Start a dedicated PvP arena session amid a drifting debris field. No factions, no economy, no jobs -- just you, your opponent, and the wreckage.
Start a dedicated PvP arena session inside a dense nebula. No factions, no economy, no jobs -- just you, your opponent, and reduced visibility.
